cards.name: Engineering Bay
cards.flavorText: The beating heart of the ship. Every bolt, every weld — a prayer to the void.

cards.name: Habitat Ring
cards.flavorText: Life persists in the ring. Gardens grow between bulkheads.

cards.name: Command Deck
cards.flavorText: From here, the stars are mapped and the course is set.

cards.name: Foundry Complex

passiveEffect.description: Structures built in this sector cost 1 less matter.

cards.flavorText: Molten alloy flows through channels older than memory.

cards.name: Power Core

passiveEffect.description: Gain 1 energy per sleep cycle for each structure in this sector.

cards.flavorText: The reactor hums a lullaby that outlasts every crew.

cards.name: Recycling Hub

passiveEffect.description: Gain 1 matter when a structure in any sector dies.

cards.flavorText: Nothing is wasted. Everything returns to the forge.

cards.name: Hydroponic Cathedral

passiveEffect.description: Gain 1 influence per structure in this sector.

cards.flavorText: Vines climb the nave. The congregation is chlorophyll.

cards.name: Commons Square
cards.flavorText: Where people gather, the cold retreats.

cards.name: Medical Ward

passiveEffect.description: Crew in this sector gain +1 max stress.

cards.flavorText: The autodoc never sleeps. Neither do its patients, for long.

cards.name: War Room

passiveEffect.description: All faction presence gains are increased by 1.

cards.flavorText: Alliances are forged in whispers and sealed with steel.

cards.name: Archive Nexus

passiveEffect.description: Peek at the top 2 cards of the world deck.

cards.flavorText: Every answer is here. The question is knowing what to ask.

cards.name: Broadcast Tower

passiveEffect.description: Gain 1 influence when a card falls off the market.

cards.flavorText: The signal reaches no one. But sending it matters.

cards.name: Minor Hull Fracture
cards.flavorText: A hairline crack. Barely visible. Barely safe.

cards.name: Structural Breach
cards.flavorText: The bulkhead groans. Something gave way.

cards.name: Critical Decompression
cards.flavorText: Atmosphere screams through the gap. Seal it or lose everything.

cards.name: Catastrophic Hull Failure
cards.flavorText: The void pours in. The ship is dying.

cards.name: Glitched Subsystem
cards.flavorText: A flicker in the display. Probably nothing.

cards.name: Power Grid Failure
cards.flavorText: Lights die sector by sector. The dark is patient.

cards.name: Cascading System Error

effects.description: Depower 1 random structure during cryosleep.

cards.flavorText: One fault triggers another. The cascade has no mercy.

cards.name: Total System Collapse

effects.description: Add 1 random tech-decay junk card to your deck during cryosleep.

cards.flavorText: Every screen reads the same error. The ship forgets itself.

cards.name: Political Unrest
cards.flavorText: Whispers in corridors. Glances that linger too long.

cards.name: Faction Schism
cards.flavorText: They drew a line. Now no one crosses it.

cards.name: Violent Insurrection

effects.description: Randomly shift faction dominance in one sector during cryosleep.

cards.flavorText: Blood on the bulkheads. The old order is burning.

cards.name: Total Societal Collapse

effects.description: All factions lose 1 global presence during cryosleep.

cards.flavorText: No one leads. No one follows. The ship drifts.

cards.name: Basic Repair Kit

effects.description: Gain 1 matter and 1 energy.

cards.flavorText: Patch it up. Keep moving.

cards.name: Data Scan

effects.description: Gain 1 data.

cards.flavorText: Knowledge is the first resource.

cards.name: Community Meeting

effects.description: Gain 1 influence.

cards.flavorText: A voice in the crowd can change the course of a ship.

cards.name: Hull Patch

effects.description: Gain 2 matter.

cards.flavorText: Slap metal on metal. It holds. For now.

cards.name: Power Relay

effects.description: Gain 2 energy.

cards.flavorText: Reroute the current. Keep the lights on.

cards.name: Archive Query

effects.description: Gain 2 data.

cards.flavorText: The archives remember what the crew forgot.

cards.name: Town Hall

effects.description: Gain 2 influence.

cards.flavorText: Democracy survives in the spaces between crises.

cards.name: Emergency Rations

effects.description: Gain 1 matter and 1 influence.

cards.flavorText: Share what you have. It's all any of us can do.

cards.name: System Diagnostic

effects.description: Gain 1 energy and 1 data.

cards.flavorText: Run the check. Trust the numbers.

cards.name: Crew Briefing

effects.description: Draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Eyes forward. Here's what we know.

cards.name: Scrap Furnace

effects.description: Produces 1 matter per turn.

cards.flavorText: Feed it scrap, and it feeds you back. Simple as that.

cards.name: Power Conduit

effects.description: Produces 1 energy per turn.

cards.flavorText: A crude bridge between reactors. Ugly, but it works.

cards.name: Junk Processor

effects.description: Remove 1 junk from your mandate deck.

decayConditions.description: Grinds to a halt without 2+ energy

cards.flavorText: What others call trash, we call inventory.

tapEffect.description: Tap: Remove 1 junk from your mandate deck.

cards.name: Overclocking Bay

effects.description: You may spend 1 lifespan from any VF structure to gain 2 energy.
Gain 2 energy when overclocking.

cards.flavorText: Push it past the redline. We'll worry about tomorrow when it comes.

cards.name: Salvage Forge

effects.description: When this structure dies, gain 3 matter and 2 energy.

cards.flavorText: Built to be broken down. Every death is a harvest.

cards.name: Hull Reinforcement

effects.description: Prevent 1 hull damage per sleep cycle.

cards.flavorText: Layers of welded plate. Not elegant, but the void doesn't care about elegance.

cards.name: The Crucible

effects.description: Whenever a junk card is removed from any zone, gain 2 matter and 1 energy.
Remove 1 junk from your mandate deck during cryosleep.

cards.flavorText: All things return to the Crucible. All things are reborn.

cards.name: Forge Union

effects.description: All structures cost 1 less matter to build.

cards.flavorText: The union speaks for every wrench-turner on the ship.

cards.name: Recycler's Guild

effects.description: Remove 1 junk from your mandate deck and gain 1 matter.
Gain 1 matter.

cards.flavorText: Certified professionals in the art of making something from nothing.

cards.name: Industrial Mandate

effects.description: Gain 1 matter per Void-Forged card in your tableau during cryosleep.

cards.flavorText: By decree: every hand builds, every furnace burns.

cards.name: The Iron Covenant

effects.description: All Void-Forged structures gain +2 lifespan.
Gain 1 matter per structure in your tableau during cryosleep.

decayConditions.description: The Covenant requires 3+ energy to maintain

cards.flavorText: Sworn in iron. Sealed in fire. The forges will endure.

cards.name: Smelt

effects.description: Gain 2 matter.

cards.flavorText: Heat it. Hammer it. Shape it. Done.

cards.name: Jumpstart

effects.description: Gain 2 energy.

cards.flavorText: Spark the core. Feel the hum return.

cards.name: Quick Weld

effects.description: Gain 1 matter and 1 energy.

cards.flavorText: A bead of light along the seam. Good enough for now.

cards.name: Strip Mine

effects.description: Spend 1 energy. Gain 3 matter.

cards.flavorText: Tear it apart. Sort it later.

cards.name: Controlled Detonation
cards.flavorText: Precision violence. Clear the wreckage, clear the chaos.

cards.name: Emergency Overclock

effects.description: Spend 2 energy. Draw 3 cards.

cards.flavorText: Burn hot. Burn fast. Hope you find what you need before the lights go out.

cards.name: Junk Purge

effects.description: Remove 2 junk cards from your mandate deck.

cards.flavorText: Sweep the decks. Purge the dead weight. The ship must breathe.

cards.name: Forge the Future

effects.description: Remove all junk from your hand. Gain 2 matter and 1 energy per junk removed.
Gain 2 matter and 1 energy per junk removed from hand.

cards.flavorText: From the wreckage, a new world. From the ashes, a new fire.

cards.name: Forge Fire

effects.description: Gain 2 matter. Increase entropy by 1.

cards.flavorText: The furnace spat fire into the corridor. We gained metal. We lost trust.

cards.name: Scrap Windfall

effects.description: Remove 1 junk from all players' mandate decks.

cards.flavorText: A cache of salvageable parts drifts past the hull. Everyone benefits.

cards.name: Overload Cascade

effects.description: Depower 2 random structures.
Gain 4 energy.

cards.flavorText: The grid surges. Systems die. But the batteries are full.

cards.name: Industrial Boom

effects.description: Gain 3 matter.
Gain 2 Void-Forged presence.

cards.flavorText: The foundries roar day and night. The Void-Forged rise with the smoke.

cards.name: Forge Hand

effects.description: Manned structure produces +1 matter per turn.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Manned structure produces +1 matter per turn.

cards.flavorText: Scarred hands. Steady grip. Born to the forge.

cards.name: Arc Welder

effects.description: Manned structure is immune to depower effects.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Manned structure is immune to depower effects.

cards.flavorText: She keeps the lights on when everything else goes dark.

tapEffect.description: Tap: Extend lifespan of attached structure by 1.

cards.name: Master Metallurgist

effects.description: Manned structure: remove 1 junk from mandate deck during cryosleep.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Manned structure: on-sleep, remove 1 junk from mandate deck.

cards.flavorText: He reads the grain of metal the way scholars read text.

tapEffect.description: Tap: Remove 1 junk from your mandate deck.

cards.name: Forge Architect

effects.description: All structures in this sector have -1 construction time.
On burnout: gain 5 matter and 3 energy.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: All structures in this sector have -1 construction time. On burnout: gain 5 matter and 3 energy.

cards.flavorText: She designs the impossible. When she breaks, the blueprints remain.

cards.name: Slag Heap
cards.flavorText: Twisted metal. Fused alloys. A forge's tombstone.

cards.name: Burnt-Out Reactor
cards.flavorText: Cold core. Dead coils. It gave everything it had.

cards.name: Industrial Waste
cards.flavorText: Toxic runoff from the forges. Nobody wants to touch it.

cards.name: Seed Bed

effects.description: Gain 1 matter per sleep cycle.

cards.flavorText: A handful of soil. A whisper of green. It begins.

cards.name: Compost Heap

effects.description: Gain 1 matter and 1 influence.

cards.flavorText: Decay is not an ending. It is a gift to what comes next.

cards.name: Root Network

effects.description: Extend lifespan of all cards in this sector by 1 per sleep cycle.

cards.flavorText: Beneath the floor plates, tendrils weave a silent web of life.

tapEffect.description: Tap: Extend lifespan of all cards in this sector by 1.

cards.name: Arboretum

effects.description: Gain +1 sowers presence per sleep cycle.

decayConditions.description: Withers without Sowers presence in this sector

cards.flavorText: Trees remember what the crew forgets. They grow toward the light regardless.

cards.name: Biome Chamber

effects.description: Gain 1 matter and 1 influence per sleep cycle.

decayConditions.description: Dies if matter falls below 2 — nutrients exhausted.

cards.flavorText: A sealed world within a world. Humid air, thick with the smell of earth.

cards.name: Living Wall

effects.description: Prevent 1 damage to cards in this sector.

cards.flavorText: Moss and vine hold what steel could not.

tapEffect.description: Tap: Prevent 1 damage to cards in this sector.

cards.name: The Great Garden

effects.description: Gain 1 matter and 1 influence per Sower card in tableau.

decayConditions.description: Dies if matter falls below 3 — the garden starves.

cards.flavorText: They say if you press your ear to the soil, you can hear the ship breathing.
cards.designNotes: Signature structure. Scales with Sower tableau count. High construction cost rewards commitment to the faction.

cards.name: Farmer's Collective

effects.description: All Organic-tagged cards gain +1 lifespan.

cards.flavorText: Alone we wither. Together, even the void cannot starve us.

cards.name: Seed Bank

effects.description: Extend lifespan of 2 cards in tableau by 1.

cards.flavorText: Every seed is a promise to the future. The bank keeps those promises safe.

cards.name: Verdant Council

effects.description: Gain +1 influence at turn start if 3 or more Sower cards are in tableau.

cards.flavorText: The council speaks for the roots, the leaves, and the soil between.

cards.name: The Eternal Bloom

effects.description: Extend all tableau cards' lifespan by 1.
Gain 1 influence per sleep cycle this card has survived.

cards.flavorText: It bloomed before the first crew woke. It will bloom after the last one sleeps.
cards.designNotes: Signature institution. Scales with survival duration — the longer it lives, the more influence it generates.

cards.name: Harvest

effects.description: Gain 2 matter.

cards.flavorText: The crop is ready. Take what the garden gives.

cards.name: Pollinate

effects.description: Gain 2 influence.

cards.flavorText: Ideas spread like pollen — invisible, inevitable, alive.

cards.name: Compost

effects.description: Gain 1 influence and extend 1 card's lifespan by 1.
Extend 1 card's lifespan by 1.

cards.flavorText: Nothing is wasted. Not even waste.

cards.name: Root Deep

effects.description: Gain 1 matter.
Gain +1 sowers presence.

cards.flavorText: Dig deep enough, and even metal becomes soil.

cards.name: Growth Surge

effects.description: Extend all tableau cards' lifespan by 2.

cards.flavorText: A season's growth in a single breath.

cards.name: Community Feast

effects.description: Gain 3 influence.
All crew in one sector: reduce stress by 1.

cards.flavorText: Full bellies and shared stories. For one night, the ship feels like home.

cards.name: Terraform

effects.description: Gain 2 matter and 1 influence.

cards.flavorText: Reshape the world to fit the seed, not the other way around.

cards.name: Bloom Cascade

effects.description: For each card with lifespan greater than 4 in tableau, gain 1 matter and 1 influence.

cards.flavorText: When one flower opens, the rest follow. A cascade of color against the dark.
cards.designNotes: Rewards long-lived tableau. Synergizes with Sower lifespan-extension effects.

cards.name: Bumper Harvest

effects.description: Gain 3 matter.

cards.flavorText: The yield exceeds all projections. For once, there is enough.

cards.name: Community Gathering

effects.description: Gain 2 influence and +1 sowers presence.
Gain +1 sowers presence.

cards.flavorText: They gather in the greenhouse. No agenda — just warmth, and words, and growth.

cards.name: Ecosystem Cascade

effects.description: Extend all tableau cards' lifespan by 1.
Gain 2 matter.

cards.flavorText: One species thrives, and the chain reaction begins. Life feeding life.

cards.name: Symbiotic Bloom

effects.description: Gain 1 matter and 1 influence per Organic-tagged card in tableau.

cards.flavorText: The mycelium remembers every root it has touched.

cards.name: Field Worker

effects.description: Manned structure gains +1 matter per sleep cycle.

decayConditions.description: Burns out if the-flux is dominant.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Manned structure gains +1 matter per sleep cycle.

cards.flavorText: Calloused hands and a quiet faith in the soil.

cards.name: Beekeeper

effects.description: Organic cards in this sector gain +1 lifespan.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Organic cards in this sector gain +1 lifespan.

cards.flavorText: She speaks to the bees in a language older than the ship.

tapEffect.description: Tap: Extend lifespan of attached structure by 1.

cards.name: Master Cultivator

effects.description: Manned structure: extend its lifespan by 1 on sleep.

decayConditions.description: Burns out if the-flux is dominant.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Manned structure: extend its lifespan by 1 on sleep.

cards.flavorText: Three generations of knowledge in every graft and cutting.

cards.name: Voice of the Garden

effects.description: All Sower cards in this sector gain +1 lifespan on sleep.
On burnout: extend all tableau cards' lifespan by 2.

decayConditions.description: Burns out if the-flux is dominant.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: All Sower cards in this sector gain +1 lifespan on sleep.

cards.flavorText: She does not speak for herself. She speaks for everything that grows.
cards.designNotes: Signature crew. Orator skill tag. On-burnout provides a powerful parting gift to the tableau.

cards.name: Wilted Growth
cards.flavorText: Brown leaves curl inward. The roots have given up.

cards.name: Blighted Crop
cards.flavorText: The blight came fast. By morning, the whole row was black.

cards.name: Dead Garden
cards.flavorText: Nothing grows here anymore. The soil remembers, but it cannot forgive.

cards.name: Counting House

effects.description: Gain 1 data per sleep cycle.

decayConditions.description: Dies if Sowers dominate this sector.

cards.flavorText: Every coin counted is a future secured.

cards.name: Trade Post

effects.description: Gain 1 matter and 1 data.

decayConditions.description: Dies if Sowers dominate this sector.

cards.flavorText: A place where hands meet and value changes shape.

cards.name: Stockpile

effects.description: Market purchases cost 1 less matter.

decayConditions.description: Dies if Sowers dominate this sector.

cards.flavorText: Surplus is safety. Abundance is authority.

cards.name: Vault Chamber

effects.description: Gain 1 matter and 1 data per sleep cycle.

decayConditions.description: Dies if Sowers dominate this sector.

cards.flavorText: What lies within is worth more than the ship that carries it.

cards.name: Market Analyzer

effects.description: Peek at the top 2 cards of the world deck.

decayConditions.description: Dies if Sowers dominate this sector.

cards.flavorText: The machine reads the currents of trade before they arrive.

tapEffect.description: Tap: Peek at the top 2 cards of the world deck.

cards.name: Toll Gate

effects.description: Gain 1 data whenever you acquire a card from the market.

decayConditions.description: Dies if Sowers dominate this sector.

cards.flavorText: Nothing passes through without its due.

cards.name: The Grand Exchange

effects.description: All market purchases cost 2 less of any resource for you.
Gain 1 data per card currently in the market.

decayConditions.description: Dies if Sowers dominate this sector.

cards.flavorText: All roads of commerce converge here. The Exchange remembers every transaction.
cards.designNotes: SIGNATURE card. Powerful market cost reduction + data engine. Construction 3 turns balances the strength.

cards.name: Trade License

effects.description: Market cards cost 1 less data.

decayConditions.description: Dies if Sowers achieve global dominance.

cards.flavorText: Bureaucracy has its uses — chiefly, discount.

cards.name: Assessor's Office

effects.description: Peek at the top 3 cards of the world deck.

decayConditions.description: Dies if Sowers achieve global dominance.

cards.flavorText: They appraise the future before it arrives.

cards.name: Tax Bureau

effects.description: Whenever a card enters your mandate deck from the market, gain 1 data.

decayConditions.description: Dies if Sowers achieve global dominance.

cards.flavorText: Every acquisition is an opportunity — for the Bureau.

cards.name: The Gilded Treasury

effects.description: At turn start, gain 1 matter per 5 total resources you have.

decayConditions.description: Dies if Sowers achieve global dominance.

cards.flavorText: Wealth begets wealth. The Treasury ensures it.
cards.designNotes: SIGNATURE card. Scales with total resource hoarding. Rewards the Gilded playstyle of accumulation.

cards.name: Inventory

effects.description: Gain 2 data.

cards.flavorText: Count everything. Trust nothing.

cards.name: Appraise

effects.description: Gain 1 data.
Peek at the top 2 cards of the world deck.

cards.flavorText: Know the value before you name the price.

cards.name: Quick Trade

effects.description: Spend 1 data, gain 2 matter.
Gain 2 matter.

cards.flavorText: Information is the currency that buys all others.

cards.name: Ledger Entry

effects.description: Gain 1 matter and 1 data.

cards.flavorText: Debit. Credit. Balance. Repeat.

cards.name: Hostile Takeover

effects.description: Spend 3 data to lock 1 market slot.
Lock 1 market slot, preventing new cards from filling it.

cards.flavorText: What they cannot buy, they cannot use.

cards.name: Market Manipulation

effects.description: Spend 2 data to shift the market 2 extra slides.
Shift the market 2 additional slots.

cards.flavorText: The invisible hand belongs to someone — and they know exactly what they're doing.

cards.name: Resource Audit

effects.description: Gain 1 of each resource: matter, energy, data, influence.

cards.flavorText: Accounting reveals what politics conceals.

cards.name: Golden Age

effects.description: Gain 1 matter per Gilded card in your tableau.
Gain 1 data per structure in any sector.

cards.flavorText: When the Gilded prosper, the whole ship gleams.
cards.designNotes: Scales with board state. Best in late-game with many Gilded cards and structures deployed.

cards.name: Trade Winds

effects.description: Gain 2 data and 1 matter.

cards.flavorText: Fortune favors those who read the signs.

cards.name: Market Correction

effects.description: All market costs reduced by 1 this turn.

cards.flavorText: Prices fall. The wise buy fast.

cards.name: Economic Boom

effects.description: Gain 2 matter and 2 data.
Gain 2 Gilded faction presence.

cards.flavorText: Prosperity spreads like a contagion — the good kind.

cards.name: Supply Shortage

effects.description: Gain 4 matter.

cards.flavorText: Scarcity is the mother of profit — and ruin.

cards.name: Ledger Keeper

effects.description: Manned structure gains: +1 data per sleep cycle.

decayConditions.description: Dies if Sowers dominate this sector.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Manned structure: gain +1 data per sleep cycle.

cards.flavorText: Every number tells a story. Most of them are lies.

cards.name: Trade Broker

effects.description: Manned structure: market purchases in this sector cost 1 less matter.

decayConditions.description: Dies if Sowers dominate this sector.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Manned structure: market purchases in this sector cost 1 less matter.

cards.flavorText: She knows what everything is worth — especially people.

cards.name: Chief Appraiser

effects.description: Manned structure: peek at top 3 cards of the world deck.

decayConditions.description: Dies if Sowers dominate this sector.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Manned structure: peek at top 3 cards of the world deck.

cards.flavorText: He sees three moves ahead. The market is never surprised.

tapEffect.description: Tap: Peek at the top 3 cards of the world deck.

cards.name: The Gilded Hand

effects.description: All Gilded cards in this sector gain +2 survivalPriority.
On burnout: gain 4 data and 3 matter.

decayConditions.description: Dies if Sowers dominate this sector.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: All Gilded cards in this sector gain +2 survivalPriority.

cards.flavorText: The hand that signs the ledger rules the ship.
cards.designNotes: T3 crew. Orator skill. Protects Gilded cards in sector from cryosleep culling. Burnout yields a large resource payout.

cards.name: Depreciated Asset
cards.flavorText: Once it had value. Now it has a cost.

cards.name: Bad Investment
cards.flavorText: The returns were promised. The returns never came.

cards.name: Counterfeit Ledger
cards.flavorText: The numbers look right. They are not.

cards.name: Data Lattice

effects.description: Produces 1 data per turn.

cards.flavorText: Every node holds a thousand truths in crystalline suspension.

cards.name: Entropy Dampener
cards.flavorText: Disorder is not inevitable. It is merely unresisted.

cards.name: Protocol Compiler

effects.description: Peek at the top 3 cards of the world deck.
Archival-core cards in the market cost 1 less data.

cards.flavorText: The parameters were always clear. We simply needed the compiler to prove it.

cards.name: Cryovault Annex

effects.description: Extend the lifespan of all friendly structures by 1.
Gain 2 data on waking from cryosleep.

cards.flavorText: We built this vault to outlast the stars themselves.

cards.name: Signal Bastion

effects.description: Prevents 1 damage to structures in this sector each turn.
When manned, also prevents 1 damage to institutions.

cards.flavorText: No signal degrades within these walls. Not on our watch.

tapEffect.description: Tap: Prevent 1 damage to structures in this sector.

cards.name: Recursive Memory Bank

effects.description: Produces 2 data per turn while you have 5+ data.
Archive this card to the legacy archive instead of transforming into junk.

cards.flavorText: It remembers itself remembering. An infinite regression of certainty.

cards.name: Stasis Monolith

effects.description: On wake, gain 3 data.
All friendly cards gain +1 survival priority during cryosleep.

decayConditions.description: Flux dominance shatters the Monolith's stasis field
Requires 4+ energy to sustain the stasis field

cards.flavorText: Time bows before the Monolith. Even entropy knows its place.

cards.name: Bureau of Continuity

effects.description: Gain 1 presence in Command sector.
Draw 1 card on entering cryosleep.

cards.flavorText: The Bureau does not innovate. It preserves. That is its genius.

cards.name: Index of Precedents

effects.description: When you play an action card, gain 1 data.

cards.flavorText: What was decided once need never be debated again.

cards.name: Mandate Vault

effects.description: Lock 1 market slot — that slot cannot be refilled.
On wake, peek at the top 4 cards of the world deck and reorder them.

cards.flavorText: The vault does not store things. It stores decisions.

cards.name: Eternal Ledger

effects.description: All friendly cards with lifespan gain +1 lifespan.
When destroyed, archive 2 other friendly cards to the legacy archive.
Prevent 1 damage to all friendly institutions each turn.

decayConditions.description: The Flux burns the Ledger's pages to ash

cards.flavorText: Names. Dates. Purposes. None will be forgotten while the Ledger stands.

cards.name: Diagnostic Pulse

effects.description: Gain 2 data. Peek at the top 2 cards of the world deck.

cards.flavorText: A single pulse reveals what a thousand inspections might miss.

cards.name: Entropy Siphon
cards.flavorText: Bleed the chaos out, one degree at a time.

cards.name: Archival Rite

effects.description: Move 1 card from your discard pile to the legacy archive.

cards.flavorText: To archive is to declare something worthy of eternity.

cards.name: System Flush

effects.description: Remove 1 junk card from your tableau.
Draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Purge the corruption. Restore the pattern.

cards.name: Protocol Override

effects.description: Lock 1 market slot for 2 turns.

cards.flavorText: When protocols are violated, override authority is absolute.

cards.name: Calibrated Preservation

effects.description: Extend the lifespan of target structure or institution by 2.
If you have 6+ data, also prevent all damage to that card this turn.

cards.flavorText: Precision is the difference between preservation and embalming.

cards.name: Cold Logic

effects.description: Gain 2 energy. If entropy is above 5, also draw 2 cards.

cards.flavorText: When chaos rises, clarity becomes the sharpest weapon.

cards.name: Total Recall Protocol

effects.description: Return all junk in your tableau to the supply. Reduce entropy by 3. Draw 3 cards.
Draw 3 cards.

cards.flavorText: Restore from backup. All of it. Every last byte.

cards.name: Data Cascade

effects.description: All players gain 2 data. Player with most data gains 1 additional data.

cards.flavorText: The archives opened unbidden. Information flooded every terminal.

cards.name: Scheduled Maintenance

effects.description: Each player may spend 2 energy to extend the lifespan of one structure by 2.

cards.flavorText: The schedule exists for a reason. Follow it.

cards.name: Archive Breach

effects.description: Each player adds 1 tech-decay junk to their tableau. Player with the most data is immune.

cards.flavorText: Someone left a gate open. The corruption poured through.

cards.name: Temporal Audit

effects.description: Each player with entropy above 6 must discard 1 card.

cards.flavorText: The audit does not ask. It reconciles.

cards.name: Archivist Kael

effects.description: When assigned to a structure, gain 1 data.
On burnout, archive the attached structure to the legacy archive instead of destroying it.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: When this structure produces data, produce 1 additional data.

cards.flavorText: Kael remembers everything. That is both his gift and his burden.

cards.name: Indexer Voss

effects.description: While manning a structure, reduce the cost of the next action you play by 1 data.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Once per turn, peek at the top card of the world deck.

cards.flavorText: Voss catalogues the uncatalogable. She finds order in the void.

cards.name: Senior Logician Thren

effects.description: While manning a structure, that structure cannot be targeted by decay conditions.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Attached structure's lifespan is extended by 1 each sleep cycle.

cards.flavorText: Thren's proofs are airtight. So are his structures.

cards.name: Chief Engineer Mira

effects.description: While manning a structure, that structure gains: 'On wake, gain 2 energy and 1 data.'
On burnout, draw 3 cards and gain 3 data.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Attached structure's construction completes instantly. If already built, it gains +2 lifespan.

cards.flavorText: Mira doesn't fix things. She makes them permanent.

cards.name: Corrupted Data Fragment

effects.description: Occupies a tableau slot. Reduces data production by 1.

cards.flavorText: Ones and zeros, scrambled beyond recognition.

cards.name: Depleted Power Cell
cards.flavorText: It hums faintly — a ghost of the power it once held.

cards.name: Fractured Logic Core

effects.description: Occupies a tableau slot. Archival-core cards cost 1 more data while this is in your tableau.

cards.flavorText: The logic was sound once. Now it loops endlessly, solving nothing.

cards.name: Signal Pyre

effects.description: Produces 1 energy per turn.
When Signal Pyre dies, gain 2 influence.

cards.flavorText: It screams into the void and calls it a sermon.

cards.name: Riot Cradle

effects.description: Each time a card falls off the market, gain 1 energy.

cards.flavorText: Where others see collapse, the Flux sees a cradle rocking.

cards.name: Molten Relay

effects.description: Reduces the cost of Flux actions by 1 energy.

cards.flavorText: Information doesn't want to be free. It wants to be fast.

cards.name: Metamorphic Engine

effects.description: Once per turn, you may transform a structure in your tableau into its junk form to gain 3 energy and 1 influence.

decayConditions.description: Archival Core dominance freezes the engine

cards.flavorText: It eats the old world and excretes the new.

cards.name: Cascade Amplifier

effects.description: Gain 1 energy whenever a card enters fallout.

cards.flavorText: Every wave breaks higher than the last.

cards.name: Schism Reactor

effects.description: At the start of each turn, shift one faction icon in your tableau to the-flux.

cards.flavorText: Split the atom. Split the council. Same principle.

tapEffect.description: Tap: Shift one faction icon in this sector.

cards.name: The Unmaker

effects.description: All market slides are doubled. Whenever a card enters fallout, gain 1 energy and 1 influence.
Flux cards in your tableau gain +1 lifespan.
When The Unmaker dies, each player adds 2 junk to their tableau.

decayConditions.description: Unravels without 3+ data to sustain its pattern

cards.flavorText: It does not destroy. It reminds everything that permanence was always the illusion.

cards.name: The Agitation Bureau

effects.description: Gain 1 influence per turn.

cards.flavorText: Every grievance is a seed. We just water them.

cards.name: Turncoat Network

effects.description: Shift one faction icon on a card in your tableau to the-flux.
Flux cards in your tableau cost 1 less influence to play.

decayConditions.description: Exposed and dismantled by Archival order

cards.flavorText: Loyalty is just a habit. We break habits.

cards.name: The Mutable Charter

effects.description: All cards in your tableau with lifespan gain +1 lifespan while Flux is dominant in any sector.
When the Charter dies, gain 2 energy and draw 1 card.

decayConditions.description: Rigid order renders the charter obsolete

cards.flavorText: A constitution that rewrites itself. The founders would be proud. Or horrified.

cards.name: The Parliament of Ashes

effects.description: Whenever a card in any player's tableau dies, gain 1 influence.
You may shift any dying card's faction icons to the-flux before it leaves play.
During cryosleep, gain 1 influence for each Flux icon in your tableau.

decayConditions.description: Without 3+ data, the Parliament loses its memory

cards.flavorText: Every death is a vote. The ashes always vote for change.

cards.name: Incite
cards.flavorText: One spark. That's all it ever takes.

cards.name: Propaganda Burst

effects.description: Shift up to 2 faction icons on cards in your tableau to the-flux.

cards.flavorText: Truth is overrated. Conviction is what matters.

cards.name: Strip Mine the Future

effects.description: Destroy one of your structures. Gain resources equal to its original cost plus 1 energy.

cards.flavorText: Tomorrow's resources, today. Tomorrow can fend for itself.

cards.name: Mutagen Splice

effects.description: Transform a T1 structure in your tableau into a random T2 structure from the vault (Mutate).

cards.flavorText: We don't repair. We replace. Better.

cards.name: Market Crash
cards.flavorText: The invisible hand just clenched into a fist.

cards.name: Identity Theft

effects.description: Shift all faction icons on one card in your tableau to the-flux. If it was not already Flux, gain 2 influence.

cards.flavorText: Who you were doesn't matter. Who you're becoming does.

cards.name: Controlled Demolition

effects.description: Destroy up to 2 junk cards in your tableau. For each junk removed, gain 2 energy.
Gain 1 energy when discarded from hand.

cards.flavorText: Rubble is just raw material with an attitude problem.

cards.name: Total Reshuffle

effects.description: Remove all cards from the market and refill it. Gain 1 energy and 1 influence per card displaced.
Draw 2 cards.

cards.flavorText: Wipe the board. New game. Same winners — us.

cards.name: Flash Riot

effects.description: When Flash Riot enters fallout, all players lose 1 influence. Gain 2 energy.

cards.flavorText: Nobody called for a vote. Nobody needed to.

cards.name: Blackout Surge

effects.description: Gain 3 energy.

cards.flavorText: The lights went out. When they came back, everything had moved.

cards.name: Ideological Wildfire

effects.description: When Ideological Wildfire enters fallout, shift 3 random faction icons across all players' tableaus to the-flux.
Shift 1 faction icon in your tableau to the-flux and gain 1 influence.

cards.flavorText: You can't fight an idea. Especially one that's on fire.

cards.name: Cascade Failure

effects.description: When Cascade Failure enters fallout, reduce the lifespan of all structures in all tableaus by 1. Gain 1 energy per structure affected.
Peek at the top 3 cards of the world deck. Put 1 in your hand, discard the rest.

cards.flavorText: One domino. That's the official report. One domino and a thousand coincidences.

cards.name: Demagogue Vex

effects.description: When attached to a structure, shift that structure's faction icon to the-flux.
When Vex burns out, gain 2 influence.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Once per turn, spend 1 stress to shift a faction icon on any card in your tableau to the-flux.

cards.flavorText: She doesn't convince you. She reminds you that you were already angry.

cards.name: Soapbox Kael

effects.description: When attached, the manned structure gains +1 lifespan.
While manned, gain 1 energy whenever the market slides.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Once per turn, spend 1 stress to slide the market 1 additional slot and gain 1 energy.

cards.flavorText: Give him a crate to stand on and he'll move the world.

cards.name: Sporewright Luma

effects.description: When attached, transform 1 junk card in your tableau into a random T1 Flux structure (Mutate).
When Luma burns out, add 1 junk to your tableau.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Once per turn, spend 1 stress to transform a junk card into a random T1 structure from any faction (Mutate).

cards.flavorText: She whispers to the dead things and they grow back wrong. Beautifully wrong.

tapEffect.description: Tap: Remove 1 junk from your tableau.

cards.name: Tribune Ash

effects.description: While manned, all Flux actions cost 1 less energy.
When Tribune Ash burns out, draw 3 cards and gain 3 influence.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Once per turn, spend 1 stress to shift up to 2 faction icons on cards in any player's tableau to the-flux and gain 1 influence.

cards.flavorText: They burned the old Tribune in effigy. Ash took the name. Ash took everything.

cards.name: Signal Residue
cards.flavorText: Ghost frequencies. The echo of something that burned too bright.

cards.name: Scorched Conduit
cards.flavorText: It used to carry power. Now it just carries regret.

cards.name: Ideological Fallout
cards.flavorText: The revolution ended. Its wreckage did not.

cards.name: Memory Beacon

effects.description: Produces 1 data per turn.

cards.flavorText: It broadcasts the names of the dead into the dark between stars.

cards.name: Ancestor Shrine

effects.description: Produces 1 influence per turn.
When destroyed, gain 2 influence.

cards.flavorText: They kneel not to gods, but to grandmothers.

cards.name: Echo Chamber

effects.description: On wake, draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: The walls replay conversations that ended generations ago.

cards.name: Legacy Vault

effects.description: Gain 1 data for each card in your legacy archive (max 3).

decayConditions.description: Fades without Echoes presence in this sector

cards.flavorText: Every archived name adds weight to the ship's memory.

cards.name: Oral History Hall

effects.description: On sleep, extend lifespan of all your Echoes structures by 1.

decayConditions.description: Even spoken memories fade after 4 sleep cycles

cards.flavorText: The storytellers never sleep. Not truly.

tapEffect.description: Tap: Extend lifespan of all Echoes cards in this sector by 1.

cards.name: Resonance Engine

effects.description: On death, spawn a copy of Memory Beacon (ec-s01) into your tableau.

cards.flavorText: It hums in frequencies the living cannot hear.

cards.name: Eternal Archive

effects.description: All your cards with lifespan gain +2 lifespan.
On sleep, if you have 3+ cards in legacy archive, gain 3 data and 2 influence.
On wake, draw 2 cards.

cards.flavorText: The ship will outlive its crew. The archive will outlive the ship.

cards.name: Council of Elders

effects.description: Your Orator crew gain +1 max stress.

cards.flavorText: Age is not weakness. Age is data.

cards.name: Naming Rite

effects.description: Gain 1 influence for each Echoes card in your tableau.

decayConditions.description: The rite is forgotten after 3 sleep cycles

cards.flavorText: To name the dead is to keep them aboard.

cards.name: Lineage Registry

effects.description: Echoes cards you acquire cost 1 less influence.
On sleep, gain 1 data.

cards.flavorText: Every birth, every death, every dream — catalogued and cross-referenced.

cards.name: The Unbroken Thread

effects.description: Your cards cannot be destroyed by Void-Forged faction dominance decay.
On death, all Echoes cards in your graveyard return to your legacy archive.
Gain 1 Echoes presence in all sectors.

decayConditions.description: Even the strongest threads fray after 5 sleep cycles

cards.flavorText: We are the continuity. We are the reason the ship remembers why it flies.

cards.name: Recall the Fallen

effects.description: Gain 1 data for each card in your graveyard (max 4).

cards.flavorText: The dead have much to teach, if you know how to listen.

cards.name: Whisper Network

effects.description: Gain 1 Echoes presence in a sector of your choice.

cards.flavorText: Rumor travels faster than light aboard a generation ship.

cards.name: Ancestral Recitation

effects.description: Extend the lifespan of target structure by 2.
Gain 1 data when discarded.

cards.flavorText: Speak their names and the steel remembers its purpose.

cards.name: Data Inheritance

effects.description: Draw 2 cards. If you have 2+ cards in your legacy archive, draw 3 instead.

cards.flavorText: Knowledge passes down like gravity — invisible, inevitable.

cards.name: Mourning Protocol

effects.description: Move 1 card from your graveyard to your legacy archive. Gain 2 influence.

cards.flavorText: Grief is a technology. We have perfected it.

cards.name: Dream Broadcast

effects.description: Peek at the top 4 cards of the world deck. Put 1 into your hand, 1 into legacy archive, rest on bottom.

cards.flavorText: In cryosleep, everyone dreams the same dream. We choose which one.

cards.name: Faction Eulogy

effects.description: Shift 2 faction presence in a sector from any faction to the Echoes.

cards.flavorText: We do not conquer sectors. We inherit them.

cards.name: The Long Remembering

effects.description: Move all cards from your graveyard to your legacy archive. Gain 1 data per card moved.

cards.flavorText: Nothing is lost. Not while we draw breath to speak.

cards.name: Voices in the Walls

effects.description: On fallout, all players draw 1 card. You draw 2 instead.

cards.flavorText: The bulkheads hum with words no one remembers speaking.

cards.name: Generational Drift
cards.flavorText: Each generation forgets a little more of why we left.

cards.name: Ancestor Storm

effects.description: On fallout, each player must discard 1 card. Then gain 1 Echoes presence in each sector where you have structures.

cards.flavorText: The archives opened themselves. No one asked them to.

cards.name: Memory Cascade

effects.description: On fallout, each player with Echoes cards in tableau gains 2 data. Each player without loses 1 data.

cards.flavorText: The ship dreamed, and those who listened were rewarded.

cards.name: Keeper of Names

effects.description: When assigned to a structure, extend that structure's lifespan by 1.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: When this crew's structure would die, extend its lifespan by 2 instead.

cards.flavorText: She carries three hundred names and speaks each one before sleep.

tapEffect.description: Tap: Extend lifespan of attached structure by 1.

cards.name: Dream Interpreter

effects.description: On wake, gain 1 data.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: On wake, also draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Cryosleep dreams are not random. They are messages from the hull.

cards.name: Archivist Logician

effects.description: On sleep, peek at the top 2 cards of the world deck.
On burnout, move this card to your legacy archive instead of the graveyard.

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Manned structure's effects trigger twice during on-sleep.

cards.flavorText: Her mind indexes what the ship forgets.

tapEffect.description: Tap: Peek at the top 2 cards of the world deck.

cards.name: The Undying Witness

effects.description: On sleep, this crew does not lose stress.
Gain +1 data and +1 influence per turn for each sleep cycle completed (max +3 each).
On wake, draw 1 card for each sleep cycle completed (max 3).

crew.expertAbilityDescription: Manned structure becomes immortal (lifespan set to null) while this crew is attached.

cards.flavorText: She has slept seventeen times and remembers every waking. The ship is her diary.

cards.name: Corrupted Data Fragment
cards.flavorText: Fragments of memory, stripped of meaning.

cards.name: Forgotten Oath
cards.flavorText: A promise made to someone no one remembers.

cards.name: Static Ghost
cards.flavorText: A signal that loops forever, saying nothing.

cards.name: Radiation Leak

effects.description: All structures cost +1 energy while in market.
Apply 1 stress to all crew in Engineering.

cards.flavorText: The bulkheads glow a sickly blue. Everyone pretends not to notice.

cards.name: Micrometeorite Storm

effects.description: All cards cost +1 matter while in market.
Add 1 hull-breach junk to discard pile.

cards.flavorText: Pebbles moving at orbital speed. Each one punches through steel like paper.

cards.name: Data Corruption

effects.description: Lock the cheapest market slot.
Add 1 tech-decay junk to discard pile.

cards.flavorText: The archives stutter. Half the supply manifest reads as poetry now.

cards.name: Civil Unrest

effects.description: Institutions cost +1 influence while in market.
Add 1 factional-coup junk to discard pile.

cards.flavorText: The mess hall erupts. Nobody agrees on what started it.

cards.name: Power Surge

effects.description: Crew reassignment costs +1 energy.

cards.flavorText: Lightning dances between conduits. Beautiful. Terrifying.

cards.name: Oxygen Bleed

effects.description: All actions cost +1 matter while in market.
Apply 1 stress to all crew in Habitat.

cards.flavorText: Breath comes harder. The seals are failing somewhere nobody can reach.

cards.name: Propaganda Wave

effects.description: Lock the most expensive market slot.
Shift faction presence: +1 random faction, -1 random faction.

cards.flavorText: The broadcast loops day and night. Half the crew believes it.

cards.name: Gravitational Anomaly

effects.description: Construction takes 1 extra turn while in market.
Add 2 hull-breach junk to discard pile.

cards.flavorText: Things fall up now. The engineers say it's temporary. They always say that.

cards.name: Memory Plague

effects.description: Draw 1 fewer card per turn while in market.
Apply 1 stress to all crew in Command.

cards.flavorText: People forget their names. Then their duties. Then their loved ones.

cards.name: Hull Parasite

effects.description: Remove the lowest-priority card in Engineering.

cards.flavorText: It eats metal. It grows in darkness. It's patient.

cards.name: Entropy Cascade
cards.flavorText: The ship is dying in ways we can measure but cannot stop.

cards.name: The Long Dark

effects.description: All cards cost +1 of their primary resource while in market.
Add 1 junk of each type to discard pile.
Add 1 tech-decay junk.
Add 1 factional-coup junk.

cards.flavorText: Between the stars, there is nothing. And the nothing is getting closer.

cards.name: Supply Drop

effects.description: Gain 2 matter and 1 energy.

cards.flavorText: Automated cargo pods from the last relay. Nobody remembers scheduling them.

cards.name: Data Burst

effects.description: Gain 2 data. Draw 1 card.
Draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: A fragment of Earth's last broadcast. Mostly static. Mostly.

cards.name: Political Rally

effects.description: Gain 2 influence. Shift dominant faction +1 in Command.
Shift dominant faction +1 in Command.

cards.flavorText: Every generation thinks they can fix it. Every generation tries.

cards.name: Emergency Repairs

effects.description: Remove 1 junk from hand. Gain 1 matter.
Gain 1 matter.

cards.flavorText: Patch it. Weld it. Pray it holds.

cards.name: Solar Flare

effects.description: Gain 3 energy. Increase entropy by 1.

cards.flavorText: Free power from a dying star. The price is measured in rads.

cards.name: Crew Reunion

effects.description: Draw 2 cards.

cards.flavorText: They woke up together. They remembered each other. That was enough.

cards.name: Asteroid Mining

effects.description: Gain 3 matter.

cards.flavorText: A rock full of iron, tumbling through the void. Ours for the taking.

cards.name: System Diagnostic

effects.description: Gain 1 data.

cards.flavorText: Run the numbers. Find the fault. Fix it before it finds you.

cards.name: Faction Schism

effects.description: Add 1 factional-coup junk. Gain 2 influence.
Gain 2 influence.

cards.flavorText: Two sides of the same argument. Neither willing to blink.

cards.name: Cascade Failure

effects.description: Add 1 tech-decay junk.

cards.flavorText: One wire trips. Then the next. Then the next. Then the lights go out.

cards.name: Trade Windfall

effects.description: Gain 1 of each resource.

cards.flavorText: A rare moment of abundance. Everyone gets a share.

cards.name: Hull Breach Alert

effects.description: Add 2 hull-breach junk to discard pile.
Gain 2 energy.

cards.flavorText: Alarms blare. Emergency power kicks in. Cold air rushes through the gap.

cards.name: Generational Wisdom

effects.description: Extend lifespan of all structures by 1.
Gain 1 data.

cards.flavorText: The elders left instructions. Good ones, for once.

cards.name: Mutiny Suppressed

effects.description: Remove 1 junk from hand. Increase entropy by 1.

cards.flavorText: Order restored. But at what cost?

cards.name: Void Harvest

effects.description: Gain 2 energy and 2 matter.

cards.flavorText: We strip the debris field bare. The ship grows heavier. The void grows emptier.

cards.name: Echo from Earth

effects.description: Gain 2 data and 2 influence.

cards.flavorText: A voice from the dead world. It says: keep going.

cards.name: Reactor Meltdown

effects.description: Add 2 tech-decay junk.

cards.flavorText: The core screams. Sleep now or burn.

cards.name: Structural Collapse

effects.description: Remove lowest-priority structure in each sector.
Add 2 hull-breach junk.

cards.flavorText: The decks buckle. Whole sections seal themselves off.

cards.name: Revolution

effects.description: Remove all institutions in one sector. Gain 3 influence.
Gain 3 influence.

cards.flavorText: The old order falls. What rises in its place?

cards.name: Plague Ship

effects.description: Apply 2 stress to all crew. Add 1 factional-coup junk.
Add 1 factional-coup junk.

cards.flavorText: It started with a cough. By morning, half the ward was sealed.

cards.name: Navigation Failure
cards.flavorText: We are lost between stars. The ship knows where it is. We do not.

cards.name: Cryopod Cascade

effects.description: Apply 3 stress to all crew. Increase entropy by 2.

cards.flavorText: Pods open early. The sleepers wake screaming.

cards.name: Total War

effects.description: Remove 1 structure from each sector. Add 1 junk of each type.
Add 1 hull-breach junk.
Add 1 tech-decay junk.
Add 1 factional-coup junk.

cards.flavorText: Every faction fights. The ship is the battlefield. Nobody wins.

cards.name: Singularity Event

effects.description: Gain 3 data.

cards.flavorText: The ship's AI speaks a language we've never heard. It says: I understand now.

cards.name: Emergency Shelter

effects.description: Prevents 1 hull damage during cryosleep.

cards.flavorText: Four walls and a sealed door. It's not much, but it's something.

cards.name: Trading Post

effects.description: All market purchases cost 1 less matter.

cards.flavorText: Barter, trade, negotiate. The oldest system still works.

cards.name: Relay Antenna

effects.description: Peek at the top 2 cards of the world deck.

cards.flavorText: It listens to the void. Sometimes the void whispers back.

cards.name: Recycling Bay

effects.description: Junk removal costs 1 less of any resource.

cards.flavorText: One generation's waste is another generation's raw material.

tapEffect.description: Tap: Remove 1 junk from your mandate deck.

cards.name: Observatory

effects.description: Draw 1 extra card on wake.
Peek at top 3 cards of world deck.

cards.flavorText: The stars don't care about us. But we care about them.

tapEffect.description: Tap: Peek at the top 3 cards of the world deck.

cards.name: Armory

effects.description: Reduce stress applied to crew in this sector by 1.

cards.flavorText: We don't want to use these. But we keep them ready.

cards.name: Cryo Maintenance Hub

effects.description: Prevent 1 hull damage during cryosleep.

cards.flavorText: The pods need tending. Even the dreamless sleep has its maintenance schedule.

cards.name: Memorial Wall

effects.description: Gain 1 influence at each cryosleep.
Gain +1 faction presence for dominant faction.

cards.flavorText: Names carved in steel. So the next generation knows who came before.

cards.name: The Compromise

effects.description: Gain 1 of each resource. Reduce entropy by 1.

cards.flavorText: Nobody gets everything. Everyone gets something. That's the deal.

cards.name: Forbidden Knowledge

effects.description: Draw 3 cards. Peek at entire world deck. Increase entropy by 2.
Peek at top 10 of world deck.

cards.flavorText: Some files were sealed for a reason. Now you know why.

cards.name: Generational Pact

effects.description: Extend lifespan of all structures and institutions by 1.
All faction presence gains are doubled.

cards.flavorText: Signed in ink that lasts centuries. The promise outlives the signers.
